description: Spread the target's animatable child parts outward from the parent's local centroid along local +Y. Used to take an assembly apart for inspection. Reverse is `assemble`.

spread.desc: Maximum additional distance each part lifts away from the centroid.

axis.desc: Direction parts spread along. `radial` spreads outward from the centroid in all 3 axes proportional to the part's offset.

stagger.desc: Delay between successive parts so they ripple instead of all moving together.

notes: The handler reads `target.userData.explodableChildren` if set; otherwise it walks immediate children that are Mesh nodes.
Original transforms are snapshotted on first play so `assemble` (or any reset) can return to rest.
